description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a low hedge and featuring both paved and decked outdoor areas. The front facade includes a small porch with a white railing, a main entry door, and several symmetrically arranged windows. The side and rear elevations display a mix of window sizes and placements, with a large patio area furnished with outdoor seating and potted plants. The roof is primarily flat with a small gable section over the front porch, and the house is bordered by neatly trimmed hedges on all sides. The exterior is dominated by reddish-brown brickwork, complemented by white window frames and doors. The overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat and gable roof, surrounded by hedges, featuring a small porch, paved entry, and a furnished patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, small porch with white railing, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, hedge border, and the transition from paved to decked outdoor areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large patio with outdoor seating, potted plants, and multiple windows overlooking the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mix of window sizes, a projecting section of the house, and the continuation of the hedge border.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of small and medium windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small porch, white railing, and no overhang or columns
